parameters.query: SELECT * FROM action_plans WHERE plan_id = $1 AND status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL';
INSERT INTO approvals (plan_id, approver, decision) VALUES ($1, $2, $3);
parameters.queryParameters: ={{$node["Parse Slack Payload"].json.plan_id}},{{$node["Parse Slack Payload"].json.user}},{{$node["Parse Slack Payload"].json.decision}}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO actions_executed (plan_id, entity_level, entity_id, action_type, meta_api_call, meta_api_response, status, executed_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, 'EXECUTED', NOW());
UPDATE action_plans SET status = $1 WHERE plan_id = $2;
